name: Select
visual_summary: A dropdown select component with an arrow icon. Use when providing a list of options for a user to select from.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready select component with the following characteristics:

Name: Select
Description: A dropdown select component with an arrow icon. Use when providing a list of options for a user to select from.
Style: minimal, glassmorphism
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: dropdown, select, option

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/Select/Select.tsx
// Tremor Select [v1.0.0]

import React from "react"
import * as SelectPrimitives from "@radix-ui/react-select"
import {
  RiArrowDownSLine,
  RiArrowUpSLine,
  RiCheckLine,
  RiExpandUpDownLine,
} from "@remixicon/react"

import { cx } from "../../utils/cx"
import { focusInput } from "../../utils/focusInput"
import { hasErrorInput } from "../../utils/hasErrorInput"

const Select = SelectPrimitives.Root
Select.displayName = "Select"

const SelectGroup = Select
